narrative.description: Subnautica is an underwater survival game where a crash-landed survivor explores ocean biomes, crafts tools and submersibles, and uncovers the mystery of planet 4546B.
narrative.core_loop: Gather resources from reefs and caves, craft oxygen tanks and vehicles to reach deeper biomes, build seabases, and follow environmental story clues while managing hunger and pressure.

mechanics.map_notes: In Subnautica, minimal UI encourages discovery of landmarks and secrets across vast terrain.
mechanics.expression: In Subnautica, minimal UI encourages discovery of landmarks and secrets across vast terrain.

mechanics.map_notes: In Subnautica, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In Subnautica, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

mechanics.map_notes: In Subnautica, a progression gate where a fixed collection target must be met before an upgrade or skill point becomes available, tying advancement directly to measurable progress.
mechanics.expression: In Subnautica, a progression gate where a fixed collection target must be met before an upgrade or skill point becomes available, tying advancement directly to measurable progress.

mechanics.map_notes: In Subnautica, a survival mechanic where the player character possesses a finite quantity of health points that decrease when taking damage, with depletion resulting in failure.
mechanics.expression: In Subnautica, a survival mechanic where the player character possesses a finite quantity of health points that decrease when taking damage, with depletion resulting in failure.

mechanics.map_notes: In Subnautica, interconnected rooms hide switches, keys, and environmental secrets.
mechanics.expression: In Subnautica, interconnected rooms hide switches, keys, and environmental secrets.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Subnautica through its core survival loop.
